text.div:
Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Cancer Registry Observation Codes v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 13 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  topographyTopographyICD-O-3 topography code indicating the anatomical site of the primary tumour.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  morphologyMorphologyICD-O-3 morphology code (4-digit histological type) of the neoplasm.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  behaviourBehaviourICD-O-3 behaviour code of the neoplasm (0=benign, 1=uncertain, 2=in situ, 3=malignant).
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  basis-of-diagnosisBasis of DiagnosisHow the cancer diagnosis was established. Coded according to the ICD-O-3 basis of diagnosis classification (codes 0–9).
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  siteSiteHigher-level anatomical site grouping derived from the ICD-O-3 topography.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  incidence-dateIncidence DateDate of incidence (diagnosis date) of the cancer case.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  age-at-incidenceAge at IncidenceAge of the patient at the date of incidence.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  addressAddressAdministrative address code of the patient at incidence.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  tumor-numberTumor NumberSequential tumor number within the patient's registration.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  vital-statusVital StatusFollow-up vital status of the registered cancer patient (alive, dead, or unknown).
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  date-of-deathDate of DeathDate of death of the patient.
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  source-typeSource TypeType of documentation source that notified the cancer registry about a case (e.g. hospital, laboratory, death certificate).
https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-observation-codes  source-tumor-numberSource Tumor NumberTumor number that this source notification relates to.
